name: Powell Library
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
description: The main undergraduate library on campus, Powell Library serves as a place for inquiry, creativity and community.

name: Charles E. Young Research Library (YRL)
avoid_times: Sunday evenings during midterms and finals
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
address:
280 Charles E. Young Drive, North
Los Angeles, CA 90095-1575
description: Named for UCLA's longest-serving chancellor, the Research Library houses research-level collections in a variety of humanities and social science fields.

name: Science and Engineering Library (SEL)
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
description: With its two locations, the Science and Engineering Library (SEL) houses research materials for physical sciences and engineering and features a variety of study spaces.

name: Louise M. Darling Biomedical Library
avoid_times: early afternoon during health sciences class transitions
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
address:
12-077 Center for the Health Sciences Box 951798
Los Angeles, CA 90095-1798
description: The Biomedical Library supports the teaching, research and patient care needs of the UCLA health and life science communities.

description: The Music Library provides resources for music research, performance and study that span all music genres.

name: Management Library
avoid_times: mid-morning and mid-afternoon during MBA class transitions
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Arts Library
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
address:
1400 Public Affairs Building
Los Angeles, CA 90095-1392
description: The Arts Library is home to a comprehensive collection of materials in the fields of architecture, architectural history, art, art history, design, fashion and costume, film, television, photography, theater and allied disciplines.

name: Louise Kerckhoff Study Lounge
description: Co-ed study lounge with comfortable couches, overhead lighting, and stained glass bay windows. Originally the Women's Smoking Room.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Kerckhoff Second Floor Study Lounge
description: Smaller lounge one floor below the third-floor space. Adjacent to Kerckhoff Coffeehouse.
best_times: any time the third-floor lounge is full
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Ackerman Union Open Study
description: Unreserved meeting rooms available as open study space when not booked. Check the schedule posted at each room entrance.
access: UCLA students, faculty, staff (unreserved rooms only)
hours_note: Varies by room. Check posted schedule.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Bruin Reflection Space
description: Non-denominational space for contemplation, meditation, and prayer. Open to all students. Quiet atmosphere maintained.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Transfer Student Center Lounge
description: Lounge inside the UCLA Transfer Student Center. Also open to commuter and non-traditional students.
hours_note: Check Transfer Student Center for current hours.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Veteran Resource Center
description: Study and community space for UCLA student veterans.
hours_note: Check the VRC for current hours.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Kerckhoff Coffeehouse
description: On-campus coffeehouse opened in 1975. Serves Sum One coffee, pastries, sandwiches, and grilled cheese. Indoor seating with outlets along the interior pillars. Outdoor patio accessible from the main entrance.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Cafe 451
description: Peet's cafe on the first floor of YRL. Serves coffee, pastries, sandwiches, salads, and sushi.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Jimmy's Coffee House
description: Named after Olympian Jimmy Lu Valle. Serves Peet's coffee, espresso, matcha, pastries, sushi, and light lunch. Indoor and outdoor seating available.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: The Study at Hedrick
description: Cafe with dedicated study areas including private study carrels, quiet reading rooms, discussion rooms with writable walls, a fireplace seating area, and natural light from large windows.
avoid_times: dinner hours when Hill residents pass through
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Music Cafe
description: Cafe in the Ostin Music Center near the Inverted Fountain. Serves Sum One coffee, pastries, and lunch items.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Bruin Cafe
description: Dining cafe with indoor seating and an outdoor patio. Menu includes sandwiches, salads, soups, coffee, tea, and smoothies.
best_times: mid-morning and late afternoon on weekdays
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Anderson School Cafe (Starbucks)
description: Starbucks inside Anderson School of Management. Accepts ASUCLA meal vouchers. Limited indoor seating; shaded outdoor seating nearby.
best_times: early morning before Anderson classes start
avoid_times: MBA class breaks mid-morning and mid-afternoon
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: North Campus Student Center
description: Cluster of student-run food options near Rolfe Hall. Includes coffee, boba, bowls, and quick bites. Large indoor and outdoor seating areas.
hours: Varies by vendor — generally Mon-Fri daytime
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Franklin D. Murphy Sculpture Garden
description: Five-acre outdoor sculpture garden with works by Calder, Rodin, Noguchi, Matisse, and Miro. Benches, shaded tables, and grass areas. Jacaranda trees bloom in spring.
food_nearby: Cafe 451 (YRL) and North Campus Student Center
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Kerckhoff Patio
description: Outdoor seating directly outside Kerckhoff Hall. Umbrella-shaded tables and open sunny spots. Kerckhoff Coffeehouse is accessible from inside the building.
avoid_times: midday when shade coverage is lowest
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Inverted Fountain Area
description: Seating area surrounding the Inverted Fountain (1968). Tall pine trees and benches on the shaded side. Water sound reduces ambient noise from nearby walkways.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Lu Valle Commons Outdoor Area
description: Outdoor tables and lawn behind Dodd Hall adjacent to Lu Valle Commons. The courtyard between Dodd Hall and the law school has low foot traffic.
food_nearby: Jimmy's Coffee House at Lu Valle Commons
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Ackerman Union Outdoor Terrace
description: Outdoor seating on the Ackerman Union terrace overlooking Ackerman Square. Shaded tables. Close to printing and food options inside the building.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Bunche Hall Palm Court
description: Internal atrium inside Bunche Hall with palm trees spanning four open floors. Sheltered from wind. Low foot traffic outside of class transition periods.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Mathias Botanical Garden
description: Seven-acre botanical garden with plants from around the world. A stream, tropical specimens, and large trees along walking paths. Free admission. No outlets or tables — suited to reading physical materials.
food_nearby: Limited — Biomedical Library area is closest
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.

name: Court of Sciences
description: Open plaza surrounded by engineering and science buildings. Benches and tables. Adjacent to Boelter Hall, Young Hall, and the SEL.
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
